title: vtubruh LOTR Mobs
description:
RPG mod that adds new structures, 
mobs, weapons, armor, bosses, pets, magic, quests, and achievements. 
It will suit not only LOTR fans but also regular content-mods seekers for their modpacks!
body:
![Major Update 2.0.0!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/b370389778cfd74588c80f9cdecda655840c8220.png)

⚠️⚠️⚠️ **Be sure to read the installation instructions!** ⚠️⚠️⚠️

## About the Mod

**"vtubruh LOTR Mobs" is an RPG mod that adds new structures, 
mobs, weapons, armor, bosses, pets, magic, quests, and achievements. 
It will suit not only LOTR fans but also regular content-mods seekers for their modpacks!**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Foreword:**

Initially, in the "alpha" version, the mod was very small. It only added one mob, the "Nazgul," and an invisibility ring. Why? Simply because it wasn't present in other LOTR-themed mods. But time passed, and I thought about expanding it. In "1.0.0," I added more detail by including the creature's armor, animation, and structure.

![cover with nazgul and shire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/646c5c06ea28d50727391777f36b1e3eca12ec5d.png)
(Nostalgic Cover of the Previous Version)

But after listening to the feedback, I realized that it wasn't enough for me to be satisfied. 
And now, after 8 MONTHS of development in my free time - version "2.0.0"

**In version "2.0.0" the following has been added:**

- 3 books with information about the mod:
1. Basic Guide
2. Book of Creatures
3. Book of Crafting, Magic, and more

![Tutorial Books](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/887c71dd5182e10b1a2dc7d1317b4df98f5d8ed7.gif)

- Many new crafting items have been added;
- A notice board with 2 quest lines has been added;

![Quests Board](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/75cd6dcedfdfa20b1d76fd7af695b4aac8a09955.png)

![Quests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/e2c40374293ac2e58131d85022dfc43afec9026e.png)

- Achievements

![Achievements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/9754e85b93b599a1b1479f93ef97f9e98a3711d7.png)

- New levels of the ring with Nazgûl on Fell Beasts;

![Nazgul on Fell Beast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/217bae19add2f8a07cc06ea69ebd04940969e356.png)

- The ring now has a cooldown;
- When using the ring, the shader changes;

![Void](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/c84b08cbfae0fd8bc6d53202d3de8c4c375c4c3d.png)

- The Fell Beast can be tamed;

![Pets - Warg and Fell Beast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/db1bbbdee22c5699ad8394b33c1f0c0dd04b7365.png)
- In Isengard, you can find 4 colors of Warg puppies, take them in your inventory, raise them, and use them in battle;

![Wargs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/0fe7f896a88ac06a60cfd38ae5e7c8d1380adcba.png)

- Special abilities have been added for the Fell Beast and Wargs;
- 2 types of Ents have been added;
- Several Ent quests have been added;

![Ent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/6a667061f9639d913ba152379a47347493b691f8.png)

- You can climb on Treebeard;
- A scene from the movie where the Ents join the battle against Isengard has been added;
- 3 Uruk-hai have been added;

![Uruk-Hai](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/ec8a17974dc41ea5e9d0b8b6e2d7c5737d76ab3c.png)

- Dozens of variations of orcs (skin, equipment, etc.);

![Orcs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/941f774374a1030dbb4c6e0584541fd0ecf11c3c.png)

- 6 armor sets;

![Armor Sets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/7787c43a349870cb6d051e776d773d2207674c6c.png)

- 3 orc weapons;
- 2 shields;
- Boss Saruman;

![Saruman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/991f9be65bdd49642037b519d57eeb6cc8b48271.png)

- Saruman's staff;

![Saruman's Staff Magik](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/b8790d16479dba6d63f6f0fb67f8236c73c2ce3a.gif)

- A special forge;

![New Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/fa145e35488533e8e1040749188546cdb123e8fe.png)

- 2 paintings;

![New Paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/1d2d3556bfed206f7de626f9f0b4d7942b5694b4.png)

- A dimension for Isengard has been added **(due to this, the installation might be a bit non-standard, but more on that below).**

![Isengard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/7f70960442fb0c49312a3d2294f8c4569d57f9ce.png)

**Changes:**

- Improved Hobbit structure;

![Hobbit Structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/d46e673efdf499c745ee8a25d9cf4a2af0ff8760.png)

- Fixed doors.


⚠️ **Installation (NON-STANDARD, READ):**

1. Download the mod for your version https://modrinth.com/mod/vtubruh-lotr-mobs/versions
2. Download additional files https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/versions/KrT3mRRH/vtubruhlotrmobs_map_files.zip
3. Download Geckolib for your version https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions
4. Create a world and exit it
5. Go to your Minecraft folder, then to your world folder, for example .minecraft\saves\world
6. In the world folder, there will be a dimensions folder - put the downloaded vtubruhlotrmobs folder there, replacing the old one (if prompted)

Otherwise, when entering Isengard, you will see this:

![Error Isengard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pGnVL7c7/images/51f8b4ceb3dbff6547b82053f6873cad8aac4a14.png)

In this case, all you have to do is close Minecraft and follow the instructions above. 
If after re-entering you find yourself underground, just jump.

Why is this happening? It's related to the large map, which I haven't been able to load automatically in the dimension yet. 
Hopefully, I will fix this in the future.

Credits:
Many thanks to EpicQuestz for allowing me to use your incredibly beautiful and elaborate Isengard map!
(Original map [https://www.epicquestz.com/isengard/](https://www.epicquestz.com/isengard/))

Special thanks to: YoshyMaker
## The mod is made using MCreator
